summary: The protagonist continues his training under Lebron, successfully mastering the Knights of Kione movement technique by integrating it with his existing shadow steps. Accompanied by his companion, Tangy, he ventures into the Valter Mountains to find Duke Blake and eventually encounters the lair of a boss monster named Johanes. After defeating the guardian monsters blocking his path, the protagonist confronts Johanes, who turns out to be a dragon.
key_moments: The protagonist masters the Knights of Kione movement technique after intense training.
The protagonist and Tangy infiltrate the residence of the monster Johanes, defeating his guardians.
The protagonist confronts Johanes, discovering that the entity is a dragon.
